hero.subtitle: A considered starter for developers who value craft. 76 components, enterprise patterns, and zero compromise — wired together so you can ship on day one.

features.title: Everything wired, nothing in your way.

componentLibrary.title: Component Library
componentLibrary.desc: 35 Radix UI primitives with CVA variants. Compound component patterns — Dialog.Header, Tabs.List, Card.Content. Dark mode ready. Fully typed with TypeScript generics.

formSystem.title: Form System
formSystem.desc: 17 form components powered by React Hook Form and Zod. Input masks, number formatting, date pickers, file uploaders, and async comboboxes with infinite scroll.

dataTables.title: Data Tables
dataTables.desc: TanStack Table with headless sorting, filtering, and pagination. Server-side query integration via custom hooks. Faceted filters out of the box.

authentication.title: Authentication
authentication.desc: OIDC via oidc-client-ts with Azure AD support. AuthGuard layout, route-level protection, and withAuth HOC for component-level access control.

internationalization.title: Internationalization
internationalization.desc: i18next with browser language detection. Namespace-organized translations, RTL layout support, and lazy-loaded locale bundles.

errorMonitoring.title: Error Monitoring
errorMonitoring.desc: Sentry integration with Vite source maps. React error boundaries with graceful fallback UI. Structured error tracking from day one.

showcase.title: See exactly what you get.
showcase.desc: 79 MDX-powered documentation pages with live previews, code snippets, and usage guidelines. Browse the full gallery to explore every component.
showcase.buttonDesc: Displays a button or a component that looks like a button.

cli.title: Generate, don't write.
cli.desc: A 7-step pipeline fetches your OpenAPI spec, parses schemas, generates fully-typed TypeScript DTOs, formats with Prettier, and writes to disk. One command replaces hours of manual typing.

architecture.title: Organized by design.
architecture.desc: 15 path aliases keep imports clean and refactoring painless. Every folder has a purpose, every alias has a convention. No guessing where things live.
